taskFlow.title: Task Flow
taskFlow.legend: Status colors: pending, waiting, running, completed, failed, paused, skipped, cancelled
taskFlow.chatPlaceholder: Control your workflow with natural language or commands

chatCommands.title: Chat Commands
chatCommands.description: Use slash commands or natural language to control workflows.

commands.list: List all nodes and their status
commands.status: Show detailed status of a specific node
commands.pauseAll: Pause all running nodes in the workflow
commands.resumeAll: Resume all paused nodes in the workflow
commands.cancelAll: Cancel all active nodes in the workflow
commands.skipNode: Skip a specific node and its dependents (e.g., 'skip B')

panel.title: Task Flow Panel
panel.selectWorkflow: Select or create a workflow to get started
panel.enabled: Parallel tasks enabled — max {{maxConcurrent}} concurrent workers
panel.footer: Background workers run independently of the main task
panel.startTaskHint: Click + to start a new parallel task

dagViz.title: DAG Visualization Level
dagViz.description: Choose how workflow dependencies are visualized in the Task Flow panel.

errorPolicy.title: Error Policy
errorPolicy.description: Control how workflow errors affect downstream tasks.

presets.skipDependents: Skip Dependents — skip tasks that depend on the failed node
presets.stopDownstream: Stop Downstream — halt all remaining tasks
presets.retry: Retry — attempt to re-run the failed task once

defaultPolicy.label: Default error policy for new workflows
defaultPolicy.description: Applied when a workflow doesn't specify per-node overrides.
